message:
fix: resolve remaining clippy lints across all targets

- test_operator_benchmark.rs: allow cast_precision_loss (benign usize→f64 in benchmarks)
- cli_app.rs: prefix unused `reason` field with underscore
- repro_issue.rs: remove unused DecisionAction import, add crate doc
- fallback_verification.rs: add digit separators to long numeric literals

All 1985 tests pass, clippy clean on --all-targets --features tui

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
